title: Kadhal Vandhale Song Lyrics Singam
stanzas: <div>Kadhal Vandhale Song Lyrics Singam

everybody listen samba
pamba rumba thumba
everybody mambo chambo
pembo calling a party
everybody move it move it
move it move it now
everybody run-in come in
it's time to the party

everybody listen
samba pamba rumba
thumba thumba
everybody crew in
shaking moving
becoming naughty

everybody gorin gorin
gorin gorin goringo
everybody time to
move on life
isn't just a party!!!

kaadhal vandhaale
kaalu rendum thannale
kaatha suthuthae
undhan pinnale

aasai vandhaale
i love u sonnale
kannu rendum
suthuthae undhan munnale

thittam pottu paarthu
thimira peasi
ennai nee valaicha..
oh aae oh oaah..

vettaruvaa meesai
murikki murichu
en nenjai kalaichu..
oh aae oh oaah..

hey vaadi hey vaadi
nee vaada malli poothaandi
eduppu konda oosi
sirippu window acthaan

muthuku thaekku maram
muzhusa paatha joramthaan

nethi naduve pottu
vekkave kashtam aachu
unna nenachae oru
oram vachukkaren

munna pola naan illai
moththama mariyachu
kuthavazhiya kooda
konji kuppuduraen

nesama unnapathi
paesa naeram pathalada
methuva munnapola
boomi suthalada

chatini’ya vittu puttu
idiliya thinnuputaen
sattunu amma keka
aetho reeluvitaen

hey veera hey soora
nee ottikitta nenjupura

paarvai pattakathi
paayum ennai suthida
enakku eppovumae
ninaippu unnai pathithaan

meesai thirutha
chinna kathirikola vechaen
mutham nenappil
naanum mookkai vettikitaen

pattu pudavai katti
patunu kaalil vizha
pathu thadava thinam
othika pathukitaen

sathulla saapadella
thinu ninnu enn udamba
sattunu chola thotta
pola maathuriye

paatunu vetti paesi
mutti nikkum en gunaththa
kattithan pottu romba
saantham aakiriyae

hey paaru nee paaru
nee paatha manam jore jore

unnaku munnalathaan
nilavae dulla irukku
ennakku kitta thatta
idhayam fulla irukku

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kadhal Vandhale?

The song is an energetic dance number that celebrates love and joy, perfect for parties and celebrations.

Who composed the music for Singam?

The music for Singam was composed by Devi Sri Prasad.

Who are the singers of Kadhal Vandhale?

The song is sung by Baba Sehgal and Priyadharshini.

When was Singam released?

The movie Singam was released in 2010.

What role does the song play in the movie?

The song adds a lively and festive atmosphere, enhancing the film's energetic and action-packed narrative.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Singam, Kadhal Vandhale is a high-energy dance number that captures the essence of celebration and joy. Sung by Baba Sehgal and Priyadharshini, the song is a vibrant expression of love and excitement. Devi Sri Prasad's dynamic composition and Viveka's catchy lyrics make it a perfect track for parties and energetic gatherings. The song's lively beats and enthusiastic vocals create an atmosphere of fun and festivity, making it a memorable highlight in the film.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Get ready to groove with the electrifying beats of Kadhal Vandhale from the movie Singam. This energetic track, brought to life by Baba Sehgal and Priyadharshini's vibrant vocals, is a perfect blend of Devi Sri Prasad's dynamic music and Viveka's catchy lyrics. Dive into the world of high-energy dance and celebration with this unforgettable number!
stanzaMeanings: everybody listen samba pamba rumba thumba everybody mambo chambo pembo calling a party everybody move it move it move it move it now everybody run-in come in it's time to the party
everybody listen samba pamba rumba thumba thumba everybody crew in shaking moving becoming naughty
everybody gorin gorin gorin gorin goringo everybody time to move on life isn't just a party!!!
When love comes, both my legs start spinning around you.
When desire comes, I say I love you, my eyes spin around you.
You planned and spoke arrogantly, and you twisted me around.
With a twirl of your moustache, you broke my heart.
Hey girl, hey girl, you bloomed like a jasmine, your smile is like a needle through the window.
When I look at the tree, I feel feverish.
It's hard to put a dot in the middle of the forehead, thinking of you, I keep it aside.
I'm not like before, I've completely changed, even in the wrong path, I cuddle and call you.
When I talk about you sincerely, time flies, slowly the earth spins like before.
I left the chutney and ate the idli, suddenly mom asked, and I played a reel.
Hey brave one, hey strong one, when you hug, my heart beats fast.
Your gaze is like a knife, it circles me, I always think of you.
To fix my moustache, I used a small brinjal, thinking of a kiss, I cut my nose.
Wearing a silk saree, I fell at your feet ten times a day, I kept it safe.
Eating all the food, my body stood firm like a tree touching the sky.
Talking nonsense, standing stubbornly, you made my nature very calm.
Hey look, you look, my heart races when you see.
Before you, the moon seems dull, but near me, my heart is full.
